name: Texture Synthesizer
description:
This algorithm is an implementation of the open source Clouds module by Émilie Gillet.

This implementation should behave and sound identical to the original. Any demos or tutorials you may find online should apply just as well to this version. The user manual for the original module is here. The documentation below assumes some familiarity with this.

parameters.name: Sample rate
parameters.description: Allows you to run the algorithm at the disting NT’s own sample rate (‘Native’) or the sample rate of a real Clouds module (‘Authentic (32kHz)’).

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description: The effect mode: Granular, Stretch, Looping delay, or Spectral.

parameters.name: Buffer channels
parameters.description: Whether the internal audio buffer is mono or stereo.

parameters.name: Input channels
parameters.description: Whether the audio input is mono or stereo.

parameters.name: Bit depth
parameters.description: Enables “lo-fi” mode (8 bit and reduced sample rate).

parameters.name: Freeze
parameters.description: “This latching [parameter] stops the recording of incoming audio. Granularization is now performed on the last few seconds of audio kept in memory in the module.”

parameters.name: Position
parameters.description: “Selects from which part of the recording buffer the audio grains are played. Turn the knob clockwise to travel back in time.”

parameters.name: Coarse tune
parameters.description: Sets the grain pitch in semitones.

parameters.name: Fine tune
parameters.description: Sets the grain pitch in cents.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: “At 12 o'clock, no grains are generated. Turn clockwise and grains will be sown randomly, counter-clockwise and they will be played at a constant rate. The further you turn, the higher the overlap between grains.”

parameters.name: Texture
parameters.description: “Morphs through various shapes of grain envelopes: square (boxcar), triangle, and then Hann window. Past 2 o'clock, activates a diffuser which smears transients.”

parameters.name: Spread
parameters.description: “Stereo spread (amount of random panning/balance applied to the grains).”

parameters.name: Reverb
parameters.description: Sets the amount of reverb applied to the output.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

input_ports.name: V/Oct input
input_ports.description: The bus to use for a V/octave pitch CV.

input_ports.name: Trigger input
input_ports.description: The bus to use for a trigger input.
